name: basecoat
description: shadcn/ui for the rest of us

scripts.docs:build:css: tailwindcss -i ./docs/css/styles.css -o ./docs/src/assets/styles.css --minify && tailwindcss -i ./docs/css/style-nova.css -o ./docs/src/assets/style-nova.css --minify && tailwindcss -i ./docs/css/style-maia.css -o ./docs/src/assets/style-maia.css --minify && tailwindcss -i ./docs/css/style-lyra.css -o ./docs/src/assets/style-lyra.css --minify && tailwindcss -i ./docs/css/style-mira.css -o ./docs/src/assets/style-mira.css --minify && tailwindcss -i ./docs/css/style-luma.css -o ./docs/src/assets/style-luma.css --minify && tailwindcss -i ./docs/css/style-sera.css -o ./docs/src/assets/style-sera.css --minify && tailwindcss -i ./docs/css/style-rhea.css -o ./docs/src/assets/style-rhea.css --minify
